title: Strawberry Realism R1
description: Bring your modern builds to life with the stunning detail of Strawberry Realism textures!
body:
Strawberry Realism is a texture that aims to improve and enhance your modern house build in Minecraft, in this texture we also completely change the glass with a modern theme such as floral motifs and others.

Please note that the 64x version is free and the 2048x version is paid, and in the 64x version there are slight differences in the textures compared to the 2048x version.

**Want to use 2K resolution (2048x)?**

You can buy it at this link https://ko-fi.com/s/1f288b1229

We recommend you to use this texture with the following mods:
1.	Fabric API
2.	Iris shaders
3.	Sodium
4.	Continuity

If you encounter emessive bugs for 64x resolution on iron bars and trapdoors with Seus PTGI, I have a shader suggestion you can try:
1.	Kappa Shader
2.	Nostalgia Shader
3.	Seus Renewed
4.	FastPBR shader

Special thanks to the person who helped me learn texture:
1. Mr.AAA

For usage and showcase rules, please read "Copyright.txt" in the texture folder and you can include a link via this website in your video description. We hope you like our work.
